description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pr that triggers on push to branches matching pull-request/[0-9]+. Use a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. Define a complex workflow with multiple jobs including pr-builder, checks, conda-cpp-build, conda-cpp-tests, conda-python-build, conda-python-tests, docs-build, wheel-build-cpp, wheel-build-python, wheel-tests, and devcontainer. Each job should inherit secrets and use a specific shared workflow with given inputs.
